name: James Mwangi
message: Sandtongrid Tech migrated our workloads to AWS with zero downtime. Their Terraform automation saved us weeks of manual work.

message: Professional, knowledgeable and highly reliable. The infrastructure is now easier to manage and far more secure.

message: Excellent DevOps implementation. Our deployment time dropped dramatically thanks to the CI/CD pipeline.
